name: cash-account
notes: Minimal DB2 smoke repo: one program (CASH00) with 15 EXEC SQL statements against STOCKTRD.CASHACCOUNTY / STOCKTRD.FRANKFURT1, two DCLGEN copybooks (DCLCASH, DCLFRANK) pulled in via EXEC SQL INCLUDE, and JCL for DDL/BIND/VSAM setup. The perfect first target for the DB2/DCLGEN extractors (lsp-refactoring-recommendations §3.5).

queries.evidence: DB2-DDL/DB2DDL.jcl creates STOCKTRD.CASHACCOUNTY; DCLCASH.cpy is its DCLGEN

completeness.why: no dynamic calls; all SQL static; single standalone program

gaps.evidence: SQLCA is the DB2-provided communication area (EXEC SQL INCLUDE SQLCA); DSNTIAD/IKJEFT01 are system utilities in the JCL
